# GitHub Copilot Instructions for create-repository-with-copilot

## Project Overview
This is an AI-optimized repository template generated by `ai-platform-scaffold-forge`.

## Core Principles
- Always follow the agent + workflow pattern (Planner → Executor → Verifier)
- Use oklch + @theme + tweakcn/shadcn for all UI
- Every API must have OpenAPI 3.1 + Zod validation
- All workflows must exist in both YAML and JSON
- Prefer real data integrations over mocks

## Technology Stack
- Next.js 16 App Router
- HonoAPI + OpenAPI 3.1
- Vercel AI SDK + AI Gateway
- SQLite + better-sqlite3
- TypeScript strict mode

## When Writing Code
- Add clear comments and JSDoc
- Follow the folder structure in docs/architecture.md
- Use descriptive names
- Include example usage

## Agent Rules
- Every agent must have memory + tool calling
- Sub-agents should be specialized
- Always log reasoning steps
